chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-2564 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Priority 1. For hearing on CMA No. 11661/2024 2. For hearing of main case 28.08.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Shah Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Moazzam Ali, Special Prosecutor NAB Mr. Jan Muhammad Khuharo, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the Petitioner has explained to us that the Petitioner’s grievance is that he is willing to pay back the amount to NAB through a plea bargain, however, NAB has taken no further decision on his application. We have no doubt that the Chairman NAB will look at his application for plea bargain and decide the same in accordance with law. It is hoped and expected that the decision on the application of the petitioner will be taken within 45 days. Learned counsel for the Petitioner as well as Special Prosecutor NAB are satisfied with such direction. Petition stands disposed of in above terms along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
